name: ollama-zsh-completion

desc: Zsh completion plugin for Timeshift (v25.12.4+). Designed for Oh My Zsh.

desc: Zsh completion plugin for makepkg (pacman 7.x). Designed for Oh My Zsh.

name: fantastic-i3
desc: My personal i3wm configuration — clean, minimal, and aesthetically considered. Self-described as "decent taste."
